name: Spinach and Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen chopped spinach, (10 oz) drained
1 can Artichoke Hearts, (14 oz) drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to broil.
2. Drain the spinach well and combine it with the next 6 ingredients in a microwave-safe dish; mix well.
3. Microwave on High until bubbly.
4. Top with provolone cheese.
5. Broil until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
6. Serve with salsa and tortilla chips.
